title: The aliases interferes despite the fact that the database is specified
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE db2.users(id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(50), age INT);
UPDATE db2.users AS u1 SET u1.age = 25 WHERE u1.id = 1;
UPDATE db2.users AS u1 SET u1.name = 'Charlie' WHERE u1.id = 1;
key_bug_features: Same aliases cause table distinction issues in queries
